comment: Ed25519 public keys (32 bytes, base64) of publishers whose plugin manifests load without a 'self-signed' warning. Updates ship with normal app releases. To add a publisher, append an entry, regenerate the binary resource bundle, and ship a release. To revoke, remove the entry — the next app launch will re-flag previously signed plugins as 'self-signed' until the user re-confirms.

publishers.name: Aiacos (project)
publishers.comment: Placeholder. Replace with the project's official Ed25519 public key once generated. Until then every signed plugin loads as 'self-signed'.
